checkpoint.contextAtWrite: WUCE feature fully closed. Manual verification complete for wuce.3 (all 6 ACs live) and wuce.15 mechanism (proven via shared commitArtefact path). DoD updated to 85/88. Bitbucket portability path documented in DoD. Next feature: HTML frontend layer over the existing JSON API backend.
checkpoint.resumeInstruction: Previous feature (wuce) is fully closed at 85/88 ACs. All code committed to master (latest: 979a998). The backend engine is complete — the gap is HTML views, a navigation shell, and the guided skill question-flow form.
